past_events.name: WMH | 2024 Masters World Cup | Auckland, New Zealand
past_events.location: National Hockey Centre, NZ, North Harbour Hockey, 159 Bush Road Rosedale, Auckland, New Zealand
past_events.description: WMH is thrilled with the number of registered teams for the WMH World Cup, 2024. 113 teams have registered for Cape Town, including 29 International Masters Cup teams, and 141 have registered for Auckland, including 33 International Masters Cup teams. We were there with our Hong Kong Masters MO50 Team. We had an awesome time!

tournament_archive.name: WMH Asia Championship 2025
tournament_archive.description: HK Masters hosted the World Masters Hockey Asia Championship 2025 here in Hong Kong. The full tournament site includes match schedules, visitor information, results, and all the details from this landmark event.
